query: SELECT mesano, situacao, COUNT(*) as qtd, SUM(CAST(troco AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_troco FROM febraban WHERE empresa = 'FLEX' GROUP BY mesano, situacao ORDER BY mesano DESC LIMIT 15;
